version_description: Acoustic live version as performed on Big Brother Brasil by Dua Lipa and one acoustic guitarist.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This version is the acoustic version as played live by Dua Lipa 04/22/2020 on Big Brother Brasil

[ch]F[/ch]     x33211
[ch]Dm7[/ch]   xx0211
[ch]Am[/ch]    x02210
[ch]G/E[/ch]   x20000
[ch]C[/ch]     x32010
[ch]C/G[/ch]   332010
[ch]C/D[/ch]   x32030



[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C/G[/ch]    [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
Did a full 180, crazy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Thinking 'bout the way, I was[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Did the heartbreak change me? Maybe[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
But look at where I ended up[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all good already  So moved on, it's scary[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C/G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all,   so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  If you don't wanna see me dancing with somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]                      [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  If you wanna believe that anything could stop me,     hey[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't show up, don't come out[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Walk away, you know how[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]C/G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]


[tab]This fill is played in the second verse after Dm7 and Am until "I'm all good already"
-------------3------
-------------5------
-------------0------
-------------5------
-------------x------
-------------x------[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Aren't you the guy who, tried to[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C/G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Hurt me with the word "goodbye"?[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Though it took some time to, survive you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C/G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm better on the other side[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all good already  So moved on, it's scary[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all,   so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  If you don't wanna see me dancing with somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]                      [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  If you wanna believe that anything could stop me  [/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't show up, don't come out[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Walk away, you know how[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
  Up, up   uh uh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C/G[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
 what what   walk away walk away uh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
 what what   uh uh[/tab]
[ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  If you don't wanna see me dancing with somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]                      [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  If you wanna believe that anything could stop me   (fill)[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
----------0--1-----
----------1--1-----
--2^0-----0--2-----
------2^0-2--3-----
----------3--3-----
----------3--------[/tab]


(This last chorus here has more chords, check the video if you can for accurate rhythm)


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C/G[/ch]
Don't show up, don't come out[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C/G[/ch]
Walk away, you know how[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now  hey[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Up, up   uh uh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]*        [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
 what what  walk away walk away uh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Up, up   uh uh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]*        [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
 what what   walk away walk away uh[/tab]
